title: Role of Umbilical Cord Management in Neonatal Resuscitation

blocks.text:
ทำไม neonatologist ต้องเข้าใจ Umbilical Cord Management?
การ clamp สายสะดือเป็น FIRST decision in neonatal resuscitation — ก่อน APGAR, ก่อน vitals. (1) 30% ของ blood อยู่ใน placenta ที่ term; delayed cord clamping (DCC) ลด residual placental blood 33% → 20% ที่ 1 min → 13% ที่ 3–5 min — placental transfusion นี้ rich in stem cells, immunoglobulins, hematopoietic stem cells. (2) DCC ลด preterm mortality: NNT=33 — ดีกว่า antenatal steroids NNT=44 (Fogarty 2018); (3) UCM ใน <28 wk → ↑ severe IVH risk — ห้ามทำ (Balasubramanian 2020); (4) ทุก resuscitation algorithm เริ่มต้นที่ cord management decision ก่อน bag-mask ก่อน suctioning. ดังนั้น: neonatologist ต้องอยู่ใน delivery room พร้อม team เพื่อตัดสินใจว่า DCC vs UCM vs ICC ตาม GA + vigorous status ของทารก.
เป้าหมายการเรียนรู้วันนี้
อธิบาย placental blood distribution ที่ term vs preterm: % ที่อยู่ใน placenta และ volume ที่ transfer ด้วย DCC ตาม time
อธิบาย benefits ของ DCC ใน preterm: mortality reduction (NNT), Hct, transfusion, polycythemia/jaundice tradeoff — cite systematic review
อธิบาย benefits ของ DCC ใน term: iron stores, myelination, 4-year neurodevelopment — cite key studies
วิเคราะห์ concerns of DCC: IVH data (large RCT), C/S efficacy, nonvigorous exclusion, polycythemia/jaundice tradeoff
เปรียบเทียบ intact cord milking (I-UCM) vs cut cord milking (C-UCM): technique, volume delivered, clinical evidence
ระบุ UCM safety boundary: gestational age cut-off, mechanism of harm (IVH), ILCOR 2021 recommendation
สร้าง cord management algorithm ตาม term vs preterm + vigorous vs nonvigorous (Fig 34.4)
อธิบาย physiological rationale: lung aeration before cord clamping → cardiovascular stability (preterm lamb studies)
ระบุ contraindications ของ DCC + UCM: nuchal cord, cord avulsion, placental abruption, nonreducible nuchal cord
สรุป long-term neurodevelopmental outcomes ของ DCC vs UCM vs ICC จาก Table 34.1 trials
1. Placental Transfusion Physiology
1.1 Blood Distribution at Birth
Preterm: blood equally distributed between fetus and placenta — 50% each. ดังนั้น DCC/UCM มีผล hemodynamic ใหญ่กว่า term
Term: ~1/3 of blood remains in placenta at birth (~100 mL total; ~30 mL/kg) — หนึ่งในสามยังอยู่ใน placental circulation
DCC time-course: placental residual blood ↓ จาก 33% → 20% ที่ 1 min → 13% ที่ 3–5 min. Longer DCC = greater transfer, แต่ optimal duration ยังไม่ทราบ
Factors modulating placental transfusion: uterine contractions, type of delivery (vaginal vs C/S), gravity (position of infant relative to placenta), infant's breathing status
1.2 Composition of Placental Blood

Placental Blood — ไม่ใช่แค่ Red Blood Cells
Iron stores: stem cells ใน cord blood → improve long-term iron stores; prevent iron deficiency anemia. Immunoglobulins: ↑ passive immunity against neonatal infections. Hematopoietic stem cells: may help organ repair including brain. Clinical implication: DCC ไม่ได้แค่ 'เพิ่ม blood volume' — มันส่ง biological arsenal ที่มีผล short- และ long-term ต่อ hematopoiesis, immunity, neurodevelopment. Katheria 2020: stem cell composition ใน cord blood ดีกว่าสำหรับ hematopoiesis เมื่อเทียบ milking vs DCC — ongoing research.
1.3 Physiological Rationale — Lung Aeration First

Animal studies (preterm lambs): cord clamping ก่อน lung aeration → ↓ cerebral blood flow เนื่องจาก ↓ left ventricular output (elimination of umbilical venous blood before pulmonary venous return established)
Sequence: lung aeration → ↓ PVR → ↑ pulmonary blood flow → ↑ LV preload from pulmonary venous return → gradual transition from umbilical to pulmonary source

Cord clamping before lung aeration: abrupt ↑ afterload, ↓ LVO, swings in systemic + cerebral blood flow → IVH risk particularly in preterm (immature myocardium + pressure-passive cerebral circulation)
'Physiologically-based cord clamping' concept: wait for lung aeration (spontaneous breathing or adequate ventilation) then clamp — supported by animal data

Human RCT (Katheria 2016, n=150 preterm): assisted ventilation during 60-sec DCC vs no ventilation — NO difference in Hct/short-term outcomes; 90% breathing spontaneously by 60s with gentle stimulation

Glottis remains closed immediately after birth → early noninvasive assisted ventilation ineffective (animal + human data). Stimulation ↑ spontaneous breathing: 81.1% vs 68.9% (P<.0001); ↓ bag-mask need: 18% vs 32.4% (P<.0001)
2. Delayed Cord Clamping (DCC)
2.1 DCC ใน Preterm Infants

DCC in Preterm — Evidence Summary
Systematic review 18 RCTs (n=2834 preterm): Fogarty Am J Obstet Gynecol 2018;218(1):1: DCC (≥30 sec) vs ECC (<30 sec). ↓ Hospital mortality: NNT=33 (vs NNT=44 for antenatal steroids — ชวนให้ตกใจ). ↑ Serum Hct. ↓ Blood transfusions. Adverse effects: ↑ polycythemia (risk diff +3%) + ↑ hyperbilirubinemia (peak bili +4 mmol/L) — แต่ NO ↑ exchange transfusions for either. Tarnow-Mordi NEJM 2017 (n=1566, multicenter): DCC 60s vs ICC — NO significant difference in IVH or major morbidities; ↓ mortality (death/major disability 29% vs 34%, P=.01 at 2y follow-up).
DCC ↓ rate of DCC ยังต่ำทั้งที่ evidence ชัดเจน: กลัว polycythemia, ต้องการรีบ resuscitate, logistical challenges ใน delivery room
Preterm: position at or below level of placenta; warmth + gentle stimulation ≥60 sec. ไม่ต้อง breathe ภายใน 30s — absence of breathing อาจปกติจนถึง 60s
2.2 DCC ใน Term Infants

Cochrane 15 trials (n=3911): McDonald 2013: DCC ↑ neonatal Hgb + Hct; ↓ iron deficiency anemia ที่ 3–6 เดือน. Iron deficiency anemia: common in early infancy in developing nations; 20% NICU infants have low MCV

Myelination: Mercer J Pediatr 2018;203:266: DCC vs ICC ใน term → ↑ myelination ที่ 12 months ใน brain regions associated with motor, sensory, visual processing; mechanism: ↑ iron availability for myelinogenesis

4-year neurodevelopment: Andersson JAMA Pediatr 2015;169:631: RCT DCC 180s vs ICC: ↑ fine motor (11.0% below cutoff vs 3.7%; P=.02) + social development; Movement ABC bicycle trail (12.9% vs 3.8%; P=.02)
Recommended: DCC ≥1–3 min สำหรับ spontaneously breathing term infant positioned on mother's chest/abdomen after vaginal delivery; more evidence needed for C/S + nonvigorous

C/S: efficacy uncertain — prior trials found NO significant improvement in Hct/tagged RBC volume compared to vaginal delivery (Aladangady 2006; Strauss 2008); ACOG acknowledges uncertainty; if DCC at C/S: position infant at or below placenta
2.3 Concerns Related to DCC

rows: Tarnow-Mordi NEJM 2017 (n=1566): NO ↑ IVH; meta-analysis 18 RCTs: also no ↑ severe IVH
DCC still recommended — IVH concern not supported by RCT data
Preterm: risk diff +3% (95% CI 1–4); NO ↑ exchange transfusions
Monitor Hct; phototherapy if needed; trade-off acceptable
Meta-analysis 15 trials: fewer infants needing phototherapy in ECC group (RR=0.62)
DCC recommended IF phototherapy access available (ACOG)
No improvement in Hct/tagged RBC volume in some C/S trials; uterus compression may limit transfer
Attempt DCC; position at/below placenta; UCM may be superior alternative at C/S
Most trials excluded nonvigorous; DCC may delay resuscitation; up to 1/4 of DCC subjects crossed to ECC in large RCT
ICC if DCC not feasible; resuscitation with intact cord: ongoing trials
Digal 2021 (n=110 IUGR): DCC → ↑ systemic blood flow, Hct, ferritin; no ↑ polycythemia/phototherapy duration; Wang 2018: less suspected NEC with DCC
Attempt DCC in IUGR — appears beneficial
Jegatheesan 2019: preterm multiples DCC outcomes comparable to singletons; theoretical concern: MC placentation anastomoses
DCC reasonable; careful in monochorionic twins

blocks.text: 3. Umbilical Cord Milking (UCM)
3.1 Techniques — Intact vs Cut Cord Milking

I-UCM vs C-UCM — Technique และ Volume
Intact Cord Milking (I-UCM): grasp uncut umbilical cord gently; squeeze toward infant 3–4 times; cord refills ~2 sec; can repeat. Delivers ~17 mL/kg (McAdams 2017) — ≈ 2-min DCC by residual placental blood volume. Cut Cord Milking (C-UCM): clamp + cut long cord segment attached to baby; hand to pediatric provider; untwist + milk entire content into baby. Allows resuscitation away from mother. Comparison: No prospective RCT comparing I-UCM vs C-UCM directly. Retrospective (Hosono 2015): no difference in blood transfusion need (preterm <29 wk). Term: repeated milking → higher blood volume than one-time C-UCM (McAdams 2018).
3.2 UCM ใน Term / Late Preterm Infants
7 RCTs (n=1455 term infants, Basile 2019 review): UCM → ↑ ferritin ที่ 6 wks (Kumar 2015). ไม่พบ harm จาก cord milking ใน term/late preterm
UCM accelerates placental transfusion: benefits ≈ DCC and superior to ICC in term
C/S + term/near-term: UCM → superior transfusion compared to DCC at C/S; more long-term data needed before routine use (Erickson-Owens 2012)
3.3 UCM ใน Preterm Infants — ข้อดีและข้อห้าม
Katheria 2015 (preterm, C/S): UCM vs DCC: ↑ SVC flow (by echo) + ↑ admission Hgb — particularly useful ที่ C/S where DCC may not provide sufficient transfusion

⚠ UCM ใน <28 Weeks — CONTRAINDICATED (ห้ามทำ)
Balasubramanian Arch Dis Child 2020;105:572 (meta-analysis 19 studies): UCM significantly ↑ risk of severe IVH (grade 3–4) compared to DCC ใน infants 23–27 wk. Mechanism: UCM in nonbreathing preterm lamb → swings in HR, cardiac output, carotid artery blood flow — pressure-passive cerebral circulation ใน extreme preterm → IVH. BUT: meta-analysis 889 preterm — UCM vs ECC: NO difference in severe IVH (RR=0.72; 95% CI 0.44–1.19) — UCM ไม่แย่กว่า ECC, แค่แย่กว่า DCC ใน extreme preterm. ILCOR 2021: against intact cord milking for <28+0 weeks; แต่ 28–33+6 weeks: I-UCM reasonable alternative to DCC. Ongoing trial NCT03019367: UCM vs DCC noninferior ใน 28–32 wk — pending.
Neurodevelopment (Table 34.1): Katheria 2018 (n=135, 22–26w corr age): I-UCM 4x vs DCC 45s — favorable language (P=.01) + cognitive scores (P=.03) with UCM; motor (P=.35 NS)
Hosono 2008 (n=112): UCM ↓ red cell transfusions + ↑ motor score vs ICC in <29 wk; Mercer 2016 (n=161): ↑ normal gross motor function 91.9% vs 71.4% (P=.005) with I-UCM vs ICC
3.4 UCM ใน Nonvigorous/Asphyxiated Infants
Potential benefit: restore blood volume, stem cell infusion for brain repair; potential risk: rapid bolus of acidic blood
Girish 2018 (small RCT, nonvigorous): UCM safe and may reduce resuscitation interventions after cord clamping
2 ongoing large multicenter RCTs: NCT03631940 (UCM vs ECC — reduce NICU admissions); NCT03657394 (UCM vs ECC — reduce HIE in nonvigorous newborns) — results pending
4. Algorithm — Cord Management by Clinical Scenario

Algorithm: DCC vs UCM vs ICC — ตาม GA + Vigorous Status (Fig 34.4)
PRETERM — Vigorous: DCC ≥60 sec; position at/below placenta; warmth + gentle stimulation. PRETERM — Nonvigorous: DCC if feasible (brief delay with stimulation ×30 sec); if no response + needs PPV → ICC. UCM in PRETERM: <28 wk: CONTRAINDICATED (↑ IVH risk); 28–33+6 wk: I-UCM = reasonable alternative when DCC not feasible; cautiously consider UCM even in most immature until DCC confirmed superior over ECC. TERM — Vigorous: DCC ≥60 sec; mother's chest/abdomen preferred. TERM — Nonvigorous: DCC if possible; UCM with caution; ICC if DCC+UCM contraindicated (cord prolapse, cord avulsion, significant abruption). Absolute contraindications DCC+UCM: non-reducible nuchal cord, cord avulsion, placental abruption → ICC.

rows: Monitor jaundice if phototherapy access limited

blocks.text: 4.1 Preterm Nonvigorous — Specific Guidance
Initial steps (suction + stimulation) during first 30 sec of DCC → allows brief placental transfusion without major resuscitation delay

Resuscitation with intact cord ('DIRECT' concept): feasibility studies positive; several ongoing multicenter RCTs; 30% of providers had difficulty placing baby on resuscitation platform during DCC (Katheria 2016)

Cord prolapse / tight nuchal cord: compresses thin-walled umbilical vein while artery remains patent → net blood transfer from infant to placenta → ECC prevents further loss + allows earlier resuscitation

Cord blood stem cells: billions of stem cells → help repair damaged cells, may mitigate brain injury. Any method (DCC/UCM/C-UCM) better than ECC physiologically for nonvigorous — but evidence insufficient for formal recommendation
5. Neurodevelopmental Outcomes — Summary of Trials
5.1 Long-Term Follow-Up Data

rows: Fine motor below cutoff; Movement ABC

blocks.text: สรุป pattern: DCC ≥60s vs ICC → consistent improvement in neurodevelopmental outcomes; UCM vs ICC → similar or improved; UCM vs DCC → mixed (UCM may be better at C/S; DCC better for <28 wk)
Larger trials with long-term NDO data needed — most trials small; Australian Placental Transfusion Trial (Tarnow-Mordi): largest long-term follow-up (n=1531, 2-year outcomes)
6. NICU Practical — Cord Management in Thai NICU Context
6.1 Before Delivery — Communication with OB Team
Pre-delivery briefing: ตรวจสอบว่า OB team plan DCC หรือ UCM; แจ้ง GA + vigorous status ที่คาดไว้; เตรียม resuscitation table ใกล้ delivery bed
Equipment: warm blankets/radiant warmer ที่ bedside; ถ้า DCC → infant อยู่ที่ maternal abdomen/chest หรือ below placenta; timer สำหรับ 60 sec
High-risk scenarios: nonvigorous → discuss cord management plan ก่อน; IUGR → DCC recommended (Digal 2021); multiple gestation → ระวัง monochorionic
6.2 Gestational Age–Based Protocol

KCMH NICU Practice — GA-Based Cord Management Summary
<28+0 weeks: DCC ≥60s (vigorous) — NO UCM. ถ้า nonvigorous + ต้องการ PPV ทันที → ICC acceptable; cut-cord milking as alternative. 28–33+6 weeks: DCC ≥60s (1st choice); I-UCM = reasonable alternative ถ้า DCC ไม่ feasible (C/S, short cord). ≥34 weeks (late preterm/term): DCC ≥60s; UCM safe; C-UCM ถ้า C/S. Nonvigorous term: DCC attempt; UCM with caution; ongoing trials will clarify. ALL cases: avoid ECC except true contraindications (cord prolapse, avulsion, abruption, nuchal cord non-reducible).
6.3 Post-Delivery Monitoring
Polycythemia watch: Hct ≥65% + symptomatic (jitteriness, respiratory distress, plethora) → consider partial exchange. Preterm DCC: ↑ polycythemia risk diff 3% — monitor Hct ที่ 4–6h
Hyperbilirubinemia: term DCC → ↑ phototherapy use (Cochrane 2013). เตรียม phototherapy; monitor TSB ตาม protocol; bilirubin peak มักที่ 72–96h; ไม่เพิ่ม exchange transfusion risk
Preterm post-DCC: ↑ initial Hct → ↓ need for transfusion; แต่ไม่ reduce need for all transfusions; monitor Hgb/Hct serial
Identify IVH early: cranial US at 48–72h ทุก <30 wk; ถ้า DCC ← symptom (bradycardia, apnea, ↓ tone) → early head US
Cord blood collection: ถ้า cord blood banking / alloimmunization assessment planned → ต้องสื่อสาร กับ OB + family ล่วงหน้า เพราะ DCC ลด volume available for banking
7. 5 Bedside Pearls

PEARL 1 — DCC ลด Preterm Mortality ดีกว่า Antenatal Steroids (NNT เปรียบกัน)
Fogarty 2018: DCC NNT=33 เพื่อ prevent 1 preterm death; antenatal steroids NNT=44 ใน same population. ทั้งที่ antenatal steroids ใช้ universally แต่ DCC rate ยังต่ำ — เพราะ logistical challenges และ concern polycythemia. ความจริง: polycythemia ↑ 3% แต่ exchange transfusions ไม่เพิ่ม; trade-off คุ้มค่ามาก. จงปกป้อง cord management time ใน delivery room — มันเป็น intervention ที่ low-cost + high-impact.

PEARL 2 — UCM ใน <28 wk = ห้ามทำ ยกเว้น ECC = only option
Balasubramanian 2020 (meta-analysis 19 studies): UCM ↑ severe IVH grade 3–4 vs DCC ใน 23–27 wk. Mechanism: rapid volume bolus → swings in carotid blood flow → pressure-passive cerebral circulation → IVH. ILCOR 2021: against UCM <28+0 wk. แต่: ถ้า DCC ไม่ feasible และ ECC เท่านั้นที่เหลือ → UCM ยังไม่แย่กว่า ECC (RR=0.72; 95% CI 0.44–1.19). สรุป: DCC > UCM > ECC ใน 28–33 wk; DCC > ECC ≥ UCM ใน <28 wk (UCM avoid ถ้าทำได้).

PEARL 3 — DCC ใน Term → เพิ่ม Myelination + Motor Development ที่ 4 ปี
Mercer 2018: DCC → ↑ ferritin + ↑ brain myelination ที่ 12 months ใน regions สำหรับ motor/sensory/visual. Andersson 2015: DCC 180s vs ICC → fine motor below cutoff: 3.7% vs 11% (P=.02). Iron ใน 'placental blood' → myelinogenesis → long-term motor neurodevelopment. 20% NICU infants มี low MCV at admission suggestive of iron deficiency. DCC เป็น easiest + cheapest intervention เพื่อ prevent neonatal iron deficiency.

PEARL 4 — C-UCM = Practical Solution เมื่อ DCC ไม่ Feasible ที่ C/S
DCC ที่ C/S: uterus contracts → ↓ placental transfusion efficiency; logistical issues. Cut cord milking: clamp long segment, hand to pediatrician, milk entire contents — allows resuscitation away from mother + provides placental transfusion. ใช้ใน: (1) C/S preterm 28–33w; (2) nonvigorous term ที่ต้องการ PPV ห่างจากแม่; (3) DCC contraindicated but not absolute ECC. ระวัง: cord torsion → untwist ก่อน milk.

PEARL 5 — First Decision in Resuscitation คือ Cord Management — ไม่ใช่ Bag-Mask
NRP 7th ed (2016) + ILCOR 2021: cord management เป็น step แรกใน neonatal resuscitation — ก่อน assessment vigorous status, ก่อน APGAR score. 'The first step in neonatal resuscitation is to ensure newborns receive a placental transfusion' (Katheria). ดังนั้น: neonatologist ต้องอยู่ใน delivery room และต้องสื่อสาร cord management plan กับ OB ล่วงหน้า — เพราะเราคือคนที่จะดูแลทารกต่อ และ timing ของ cord clamping มีผลต่อ hemodynamics ของทารกในระยะ transition ทั้งหมด.
8. Evidence Update — Key Studies

Fogarty M et al Am J Obstet Gynecol 2018;218(1):1 (SR/meta-analysis): 18 RCTs, n=2834 preterm; DCC ≥30s vs ECC <30s: ↓ hospital mortality NNT=33; ↑ Hct; ↓ transfusions; ↑ polycythemia risk diff +3% + ↑ peak bili +4 mmol/L; NO ↑ exchange transfusions

Tarnow-Mordi W et al NEJM 2017;377(25):2445 (RCT, n=1566): DCC 60s vs ICC in preterm multicenter: NO significant difference in IVH or major morbidities; ↓ composite death/major disability 29% vs 34% (P=.01) at 2-year follow-up
McDonald SJ et al Cochrane 2013 (CD004074): 15 RCTs, n=3911 term pairs; DCC ↑ Hgb + Hct; ↓ iron deficiency anemia 3–6 months; ↑ phototherapy (early clamping fewer: RR=0.62; 95% CI 0.41–0.96)
Mercer JS et al J Pediatr 2018;203:266 (RCT): DCC vs ICC term: ↑ 4-month ferritin; ↑ brain myelination at 12 months in motor/sensory/visual processing regions (MRI)
Andersson O et al JAMA Pediatr 2015;169:631 (RCT, n=263): DCC 180s vs ICC: fine motor below ASQ cutoff 3.7% vs 11.0% (P=.02); Movement ABC bicycle trail 3.8% vs 12.9% (P=.02) at 4 years
Katheria AC et al Pediatrics 2015;136(1):61 (RCT): UCM vs DCC in preterm at C/S: UCM → ↑ SVC flow (echo) + ↑ admission Hgb; UCM provides greater transfusion than DCC at C/S
Balasubramanian H et al Arch Dis Child 2020;105(6):572 (meta-analysis 19 studies): UCM vs DCC in preterm: UCM significantly ↑ severe IVH; meta-analysis warns against UCM in extremely preterm infants
El-Naggar W et al J Pediatr 2020;225:58 (national cohorts US + Canada): UCM vs ECC: NO significant ↑ severe IVH; supports UCM not inferior to ECC (RR=0.72; 95% CI 0.44–1.19)
Perlman JM et al / ILCOR Pediatrics 2015;136(suppl 2):S120 (updated 2021): against I-UCM <28+0 wk; I-UCM reasonable alternative to DCC ที่ 28–33+6 wk
Katheria A et al J Pediatr 2016;178:75 (RCT, n=150 preterm): assisted ventilation during DCC 60s vs no ventilation: NO difference in Hct/short-term outcomes; 90% breathing by 60s with stimulation
Katheria A et al J Pediatr 2018;194:76 (RCT, n=135, 22–26w corr): I-UCM 4x vs DCC 45s: language score 93 vs 87 (P=.01); cognitive 100 vs 95 (P=.03); motor NS
Digal KC et al Eur J Pediatr 2021;180:1701 (RCT, n=110 IUGR): DCC in IUGR: ↑ systemic blood flow, Hct, ferritin; NO ↑ polycythemia or phototherapy duration
Wang M et al J Pediatr 2018;201:264: DCC in suspected IUGR: less suspected NEC with DCC — no evidence of harm
Jegatheesan P et al Arch Dis Child 2019;104(6):F575: preterm multiples DCC: outcomes comparable singletons, first- vs second-order, MC vs DC — DCC feasible + safe in multiples

KC A et al BMJ Paediatrics Open 2022;5:e001207: stimulation before cord clamping ↑ spontaneous breathing (81.1% vs 68.9%; P<.0001); ↓ bag-mask need (18.0% vs 32.4%; P<.0001); ↓ Apgar <3 at 1 min (7.6% vs 11.5%; P=.001)
Hosono S et al Arch Dis Child 2008;93:F14 (RCT, n=112 <29 wk): UCM ↓ red cell transfusions + ↑ adaptation; normal gross motor function 91.9% vs 71.4% UCM vs ICC (P=.005)
9. Self-Check Q&A
Q: DCC ใน preterm ลด mortality ได้ NNT เท่าไหร่ และเปรียบเทียบกับ antenatal steroids?

ตอบ: DCC: NNT=33 (Fogarty 2018, 18 RCTs, n=2834). Antenatal steroids: NNT=44 ใน same population. ดังนั้น DCC มี NNT ที่ดีกว่า antenatal steroids ที่ใช้กันทั่วไป. Benefits: ↑ Hct, ↓ transfusions. Trade-offs: ↑ polycythemia (risk diff +3%) + ↑ peak bili (+4 mmol/L) แต่ NO ↑ exchange transfusions.
Q: UCM ใน <28 wk ทำได้หรือไม่? ถ้าต้องทำ ควรทำแบบไหน?

ตอบ: I-UCM <28+0 wk: CONTRAINDICATED (ILCOR 2021) เพราะ ↑ severe IVH risk vs DCC (Balasubramanian 2020 meta-analysis 19 studies). แต่: UCM ≈ ECC ใน severe IVH risk (RR=0.72 NS vs ECC) — ถ้า DCC ไม่ feasible, cut-cord milking เป็น option ดีกว่า ECC. สรุป: พยายาม DCC ก่อนเสมอ; ถ้า DCC ไม่ได้ → C-UCM > I-UCM > ECC ใน <28 wk.
Q: Physiological basis ของ DCC ใน preterm คืออะไร? ทำไม cord clamping ก่อน lung aeration เป็นอันตราย?

ตอบ: Cord clamping ก่อน lung aeration → eliminate umbilical venous blood before pulmonary venous return established as LV source → ↓ LVO → ↓ cerebral blood flow → cerebrovascular injury. Lung aeration first → ↓ PVR → ↑ pulmonary blood flow → ↑ LV preload from pulmonary venous return → smooth transition → less swings in systemic + cerebral blood flow → ↓ IVH risk. Animal data (preterm lamb): strong; human studies: stimulation ↑ spontaneous breathing → allows DCC to coincide with lung aeration.
Q: DCC ใน term: neurodevelopmental benefit เป็นอย่างไร? cite specific studies

ตอบ: Mercer 2018 (J Pediatr 203:266): DCC → ↑ ferritin ที่ 4 months + ↑ brain myelination ที่ 12 months ใน motor/sensory/visual regions (MRI). Andersson 2015 (JAMA Pediatr 169:631): DCC 180s vs ICC at 4 years: fine motor below ASQ cutoff 3.7% vs 11% (P=.02); Movement ABC bicycle trail 3.8% vs 12.9% (P=.02). Mechanism: iron → early myelinogenesis → long-term motor/cognitive outcomes.
Q: ถ้า OB ทำ C/S และ cord สั้น DCC ไม่ feasible — cord management ที่ดีที่สุดคืออะไร?

ตอบ: Cut-Cord Milking (C-UCM): clamp + cut cord segment ยาว; hand to neonatologist; untwist + milk contents ทั้งหมดเข้าทารก. Katheria 2015: UCM ที่ C/S → ↑ SVC flow + ↑ admission Hgb vs DCC — UCM ให้ transfusion ดีกว่า DCC ที่ C/S (uterus clamping down ↓ DCC efficacy). For <28 wk at C/S: ถ้า vigorous → DCC preferred; ถ้า C-UCM จำเป็น → safer than I-UCM.
Q: ทารก IUGR ที่ UA Doppler แสดง AEDV: ควรทำ DCC หรือ ECC?

ตอบ: DCC ใน IUGR: Digal 2021 (n=110) — DCC → ↑ systemic blood flow, Hct, ferritin; NO ↑ polycythemia/phototherapy. Wang 2018: ↓ suspected NEC with DCC. Recommendation: attempt DCC ใน IUGR — appears beneficial, no harm. หลัง delivery: monitor polycythemia (Hct ≥65% + symptoms); NEC vigilance: trophic feeds HM; SMA velocity monitoring; ↑ risk NEC 4x in IUGR+AEDV.
Q: Polycythemia หลัง DCC: definition, อาการ, management?

ตอบ: Definition: Hct ≥65% ใน peripheral blood (venous). DCC risk: preterm meta-analysis risk diff +3% (1–4%); term Cochrane: ↑ phototherapy use. Symptoms: plethora, jitteriness, hypoglycemia, respiratory distress, poor feeding, cardiomegaly. Management: asymptomatic → monitor Hct serial ทุก 4–6h ครั้งแรก; symptomatic polycythemia (Hct ≥70% + symptoms): partial exchange transfusion with NS (10 mL/kg). NO ↑ exchange transfusions in DCC trials.
Q: stimulation ก่อน cord clamping มีผลอย่างไร? evidence?

ตอบ: KC 2022 (BMJ Paediatrics Open; n=2563): stimulation before cord clamping vs none: ↑ spontaneous breathing 81.1% vs 68.9% (P<.0001); ↓ bag-mask 18% vs 32.4% (P<.0001); ↓ Apgar <3 at 1 min 7.6% vs 11.5% (P=.001); ↑ adjusted OR spontaneous breathing 1.84 (95% CI 1.48–2.29). Clinical takeaway: stimulate during DCC → ↑ lung aeration → physiologically-based cord clamping → ↓ hemodynamic swings.
Q: Contraindications ของ DCC + UCM มีอะไรบ้าง?

ตอบ: Absolute contraindications (ICC ทันที): (1) Non-reducible nuchal cord; (2) Cord avulsion; (3) Significant placental abruption (cord prolapse with compromised venous flow). Relative: nonvigorous neonate needing immediate PPV (DCC attempt 30s ok; UCM with caution). UCM additional contraindication: <28+0 weeks (↑ IVH risk). Multiple gestation: monochorionic placentas — theoretical concern arteriovenous anastomosis, but recent cohort showed comparable outcomes.
Q: อธิบาย ILCOR 2021 recommendations สำหรับ cord management

ตอบ: ILCOR 2021 (Int Liaison Committee on Resuscitation): (1) Against intact cord milking for infants <28+0 weeks GA; (2) 28–33+6 weeks: I-UCM = reasonable alternative to DCC; (3) term vigorous: DCC ≥60s recommended; (4) nonvigorous: insufficient evidence for recommendation (ongoing trials). Principle: placental transfusion = FIRST step in resuscitation; any method providing it (DCC or UCM) preferable to ECC unless true contraindication.

Day 132 Preview — Fanaroff Ch.35
บทต่อไป: Chapter 35 — Thermal Environment of the Intensive Care Nursery. เตรียมตัว: thermoregulation ใน neonate — neutral thermal environment (NTE), brown fat thermogenesis, non-shivering thermogenesis; hypothermia prevention ใน delivery room (plastic bag/wrap, hat, warm room); radiant warmer vs incubator — indications + servo control; temperature target ที่ NICU admission (36.5–37.5°C axillary); NTE calculation by GA/BW + postnatal age; complications of hyperthermia + hypothermia — NEC, IVH, apnea, mortality.
